covered_domains: auth coordinator and secure-store token boundary
packaged renderer shell config and splash fallback

rows.label: Desktop shell launch
rows.persistence_boundary: not required
rows.audit_boundary: not required for shell startup; no packaged release claim

rows.label: Approved local dev renderer target
rows.persistence_boundary: not required
rows.audit_boundary: not required for renderer target selection

rows.label: Unapproved renderer/navigation/window-open
rows.persistence_boundary: no mutation or persistence
rows.audit_boundary: not required for navigation denial; source/test guard evidence only

rows.label: materRuntime.context
rows.persistence_boundary: not required; active-shell wiring proof missing
rows.audit_boundary: not reached in active shell because runtime.js is not loaded by main.js

rows.label: Desktop login submit
rows.persistence_boundary: secure store/session cache proof remains P6/P4
rows.audit_boundary: external runtime/API audit proof remains P4/P6

rows.label: Desktop logout
rows.persistence_boundary: secure store and registered cache stores cleared by wipeSessionCaches
rows.audit_boundary: session cleanup proof covered by contract tests; no real Electron click proof in P2-T07

rows.label: Dashboard feature check
rows.persistence_boundary: not required for smoke read; runtime proof pending
rows.audit_boundary: runtime smoke/audit receipt remains P4/P6

rows.label: Admin feature check
rows.persistence_boundary: not required for smoke read; runtime proof pending
rows.audit_boundary: runtime smoke/audit receipt remains P4/P6

rows.label: Password reset bridge methods
rows.persistence_boundary: runtime reset token/email flow proof pending; no visible offline.html controls currently trigger it
rows.audit_boundary: runtime reset receipt proof pending

rows.label: Session status/runtime/accounts load
rows.persistence_boundary: read-only status/accounts load
rows.audit_boundary: runtime/account read proof remains P4/P6

rows.label: Choose file for upload
rows.persistence_boundary: backend ingest proof pending; renderer never receives file bytes/path
rows.audit_boundary: file_bridge.upload permission/picker events exist in controller; active shell receipt missing

rows.label: Save document as
rows.persistence_boundary: user-selected file write proof pending; renderer never supplies document bytes
rows.audit_boundary: file_bridge.download precheck/save events exist in controller; active shell receipt missing

rows.label: File picker without trusted gesture
rows.persistence_boundary: no file action without gesture
rows.audit_boundary: guard proof is local unit/contract evidence

rows.label: Renderer-supplied file/document bytes
rows.persistence_boundary: no renderer-supplied file/document bytes accepted
rows.audit_boundary: guard proof is local unit/contract evidence

rows.label: File bridge denied permission
rows.persistence_boundary: no dialog/write when permission precheck denies
rows.audit_boundary: precheckDenied audit event recorded in controller

rows.label: Open temp preview
rows.persistence_boundary: scoped temp file with TTL; active shell open proof pending
rows.audit_boundary: file_bridge.preview.opened event exists in manager; active shell receipt missing

rows.label: Temp preview cache cleanup
rows.persistence_boundary: removes scoped temp files on TTL/logout/tenant switch/app quit hooks when manager is wired
rows.audit_boundary: cache_wipe audit event recorded by temp preview manager

rows.label: Route-only matter/document/task deep links
rows.persistence_boundary: route intent only; no mutation persistence
rows.audit_boundary: deep_link.*.opened or deep_link.*.denied audit event per route type

rows.label: Auth callback deep link
rows.persistence_boundary: token_set secure-store persistence only after callback state/code validation; external auth receipt proof pending
rows.audit_boundary: deep_link.auth_callback.opened/denied event path exists

rows.label: Forbidden action deep links
rows.persistence_boundary: no mutation from deep link
rows.audit_boundary: parser rejects before mutation; no write audit expected

rows.label: Invalid deep link route/query/id
rows.persistence_boundary: no mutation or route open for invalid deep link
rows.audit_boundary: invalid route guard is parser-level evidence

rows.label: Notification click route intent
rows.persistence_boundary: not required for route intent; no mutation
rows.audit_boundary: notification click shell routing/runtime receipt remains P6/P4

rows.label: Notification action/sensitive payload guard
rows.persistence_boundary: no mutation from notification click
rows.audit_boundary: guard proof is parser/unit evidence

rows.label: Signed internal update apply
rows.persistence_boundary: controller version state only in test double; packaged updater persistence proof missing
rows.audit_boundary: update receipt/owner approval/notarization absent

rows.label: Signed internal rollback
rows.persistence_boundary: controller version state only in test double; packaged rollback proof missing
rows.audit_boundary: rollback receipt/owner approval absent

rows.label: Public update channel
rows.persistence_boundary: no update state change on public channel denial
rows.audit_boundary: guard proof is controller/unit evidence; no public release claim
